text: If T-54 ever lands, a doctor/lint command should validate that any cached last-id metadata still matches the observed highest ticket ID. Otherwise the optimization becomes a new corruption vector.

Depends naturally on T-82 (shared validation). Doctor command: walk all state dirs, call Issue.validate() on each, report issues. Also check: no dangling dep references, no cycles. Good first pass before T-54 or T-48 land.
linter should automatically be called on changed files when a 'gittoc pull' wasn't a trivial merge
I would prefer 'git toc fsck' to stay similar to git semantics. still should be read-only and incidate warnings/errors only.
